context.audience: Full-stack developers deploying latency-sensitive apps to edge runtimes, platform teams moving APIs to regional execution, and AI builders running inference and orchestration close to users
pain_points: Working within edge runtime limitations like restricted Node APIs and CPU time budgets
Database access from edge functions with replication, connection limits, and tail latency
Debugging and testing edge functions locally before deployment
Handling vendor lock-in concerns when adopting platform-specific edge features
Choosing where to run LLM workloads between Workers AI, serverless regions, and dedicated GPUs
content_that_works: LLM at the edge architecture breakdowns
subtopics: Workers AI inference routing and failover
